name: Almond Cooler
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Lemon sherbet, or orange sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the boiling water over the tea bags.
2. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Remove the tea bags and discard them.
4. Chill the tea for at least 2 hours.
5. At serving time, spoon the sherbet into 4 chilled glasses.
6. Pour the chilled tea into each glass.
Makes: 4 - 8 oz servings
Per serving: 129 cal., 1 g. protein, 30 g. carbs., 1 g. fat, 10 mg. sodium
